german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not Dominant
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant portion of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility issues.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate, Leaving Technical Roles Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core and Technical PM roles, highlighting an imbalance in the product management landscape.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Market
seniority.subtitle: With over half of positions held by senior professionals, the market is clearly senior-heavy.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of employees still prefer on-site arrangements over hybrid or remote work.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: 39% of roles prioritize AI responsibilities, with 36% requiring AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Are Equally Distributed Across Categories
industry.subtitle: No single category dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
